main.name: Atraxa, Grand Unifier
main.oracle_text:
Flying, vigilance, deathtouch, lifelink
When Atraxa enters, reveal the top ten cards of your library. For each card type, you may put a card of that type from among the revealed cards into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. (Artifact, battle, creature, enchantment, instant, land, planeswalker, and sorcery are card types.)

card.name: Eternal Witness
card.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may return target card from your graveyard to your hand.
card.flavor_text: She remembers every word spoken, from the hero's oath to the baby's cry.

card.name: Swan Song
card.oracle_text: Counter target enchantment, instant, or sorcery spell. Its controller creates a 2/2 blue Bird creature token with flying.
card.flavor_text: The gracefulness of their flight makes one wonder whether Nature or, indeed, a rare sort of Magic lifts their wings.

card.name: Felidar Guardian
card.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may exile another target permanent you control, then return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control.
card.flavor_text: The loyalty of a felidar is hard won but worth the effort.

card.name: Marsh Flats
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Plains or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Misty Rainforest
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Forest or Island card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Venser, the Sojourner
card.oracle_text:
+2: Exile target permanent you own. Return it to the battlefield under your control at the beginning of the next end step.
−1: Creatures can't be blocked this turn.
−8: You get an emblem with "Whenever you cast a spell, exile target permanent."

card.name: Lotus Petal
card.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.
card.flavor_text: "Hard to imagine," mused Hanna, stroking the petal, "such a lovely flower inspiring such greed."

card.name: Ephemerate
card.oracle_text:
Exile target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.
Rebound (If you cast this spell from your hand, exile it as it resolves. At the beginning of your next upkeep, you may cast this card from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Ranger-Captain of Eos
card.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, you may search your library for a creature card with mana value 1 or less, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
Sacrifice this creature: Your opponents can't cast noncreature spells this turn.

card.name: Winds of Abandon
card.oracle_text:
Exile target creature you don't control. For each creature exiled this way, its controller searches their library for a basic land card. Those players put those cards onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
Overload {4}{W}{W} (You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change "target" in its text to "each.")

card.name: Thassa, Deep-Dwelling
card.oracle_text:
Indestructible
As long as your devotion to blue is less than five, Thassa isn't a creature.
At the beginning of your end step, exile up to one other target creature you control, then return that card to the battlefield under your control.
{3}{U}: Tap another target creature.

card.name: Cyclonic Rift
card.oracle_text:
Return target nonland permanent you don't control to its owner's hand.
Overload {6}{U} (You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change "target" in its text to "each.")
card.flavor_text: "Oh, *that's* what that switch does!"

card.name: Mox Opal
card.oracle_text: Metalcraft — {T}: Add one mana of any color. Activate only if you control three or more artifacts.
card.flavor_text: What crossed her mind defied Orthodoxy: could there be perfection beyond *compleation*?

card.name: Noble Hierarch
card.oracle_text:
Exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)
{T}: Add {G}, {W}, or {U}.
card.flavor_text: In all her years of vigil, her resolve has never faltered.

card.name: Toxic Deluge
card.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay X life.
All creatures get -X/-X until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: Armor dissolved into flesh. Flesh melted to bone. Bone fell away to nothing.

card.name: Indatha Triome
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {W}, {B}, or {G}.)
This land enters tapped.
Cycling {3} ({3}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Yorion, Sky Nomad
card.oracle_text:
Companion — Your starting deck contains at least twenty cards more than the minimum deck size. (If this card is your chosen companion, you may put it into your hand from outside the game for {3} as a sorcery.)
Flying
When Yorion enters, exile any number of other nonland permanents you own and control. Return those cards to the battlefield at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Three Visits
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a Forest card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text:
"Trying to meet a worthy man in the wrong way is as bad as closing the door on an invited guest."
—Mencius, a Chinese philosopher

card.name: Silence
card.oracle_text: Your opponents can't cast spells this turn.
card.flavor_text:
"Take a quiet moment to reflect on your sins."
—Cleph, Order of Redeemed Souls

card.name: Polluted Delta
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for an Island or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Where dragons once prevailed, their bones now sink.

card.name: Windswept Heath
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Forest or Plains card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Where dragons once roared, their bones now keen.

card.name: Acrobatic Maneuver
card.oracle_text:
Exile target creature you control, then return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control.
Draw a card.
card.flavor_text: Renegades find ever more creative ways to work around the Consulate's aether regulations.

card.name: Dark Ritual
card.oracle_text: Add {B}{B}{B}.

card.name: Flusterstorm
card.oracle_text:
Counter target instant or sorcery spell unless its controller pays {1}.
Storm (When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn. You may choose new targets for the copies.)

card.name: Fellwar Stone
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color that a land an opponent controls could produce.
card.flavor_text:
"What do you have that I cannot obtain?"
—Mairsil, the Pretender

card.name: Ranar the Ever-Watchful
card.oracle_text:
Flying, vigilance
The first card you foretell each turn costs {0} to foretell.
Whenever one or more cards are put into exile from your hand or a spell or ability you control exiles one or more permanents from the battlefield, create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying.

card.name: Cosmic Intervention
card.oracle_text:
If a permanent you control would be put into a graveyard from the battlefield this turn, exile it instead. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.
Foretell {1}{W} (During your turn, you may pay {2} and exile this card from your hand face down. Cast it on a later turn for its foretell cost.)

card.name: Brago, King Eternal
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever Brago deals combat damage to a player, exile any number of target nonland permanents you control, then return those cards to the battlefield under their owner's control.
card.flavor_text: "My rule persists beyond death itself."

card.name: Eerie Interlude
card.oracle_text: Exile any number of target creatures you control. Return those cards to the battlefield under their owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.
card.flavor_text: The barrier between existence and oblivion is thinner than you know.

card.name: Momentary Blink
card.oracle_text:
Exile target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.
Flashback {3}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Soulherder
card.oracle_text:
Whenever a creature is exiled from the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
At the beginning of your end step, you may exile another target creature you control, then return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control.
card.flavor_text: It watches over every absence.

card.name: Nature's Lore
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a Forest card, put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: "Greetings, tired traveler."

card.name: Esper Sentinel
card.oracle_text: Whenever an opponent casts their first noncreature spell each turn, draw a card unless that player pays {X}, where X is this creature's power.
card.flavor_text: The more Esper changes, the more he refuses to.

card.name: Teleportation Circle
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of your end step, exile up to one target artifact or creature you control, then return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control.
card.flavor_text:
"Hold on to your lunch!"
—Bartleby, gnome wizard

card.name: Watery Grave
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {U} or {B}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

That player may search their library for a land card with a basic land type, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each legendary creature you control.

card.name: Otawara, Soaring City
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {U}.
Channel — {3}{U}, Discard this card: Return target artifact, creature, enchantment, or planeswalker to its owner's hand. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each legendary creature you control.

card.name: Spara's Headquarters
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {G}, {W}, or {U}.)
This land enters tapped.
Cycling {3} ({3}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: An Offer You Can't Refuse
card.oracle_text: Counter target noncreature spell. Its controller creates two Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
card.flavor_text: Elspeth wanted answers. Xander needed a spy. Their paths were destined to cross.

card.name: Mana Confluence
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any color.
card.flavor_text: Better places poured prismatic dreams into the world, rendering it anew.

card.name: Mana Drain
card.oracle_text: Counter target spell. At the beginning of your next main phase, add an amount of {C} equal to that spell's mana value.
card.flavor_text: "I suppose you've never heard of conservation of energy."

card.name: Force of Negation
card.oracle_text:
If it's not your turn, you may exile a blue card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
Counter target noncreature spell. If that spell is countered this way, exile it instead of putting it into its owner's graveyard.
card.flavor_text: Not even the most scathing critics can break her concentration.

card.name: City of Brass
card.oracle_text:
Whenever this land becomes tapped, it deals 1 damage to you.
{T}: Add one mana of any color.
card.flavor_text: To walk its streets is to burn in its beauty.

card.name: Flickerwisp
card.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, exile another target permanent. Return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.
card.flavor_text: Its wings disturb more than air.

card.name: Wall of Omens
card.oracle_text:
Defender
When this creature enters, draw a card.
card.flavor_text:
"What will be has always been."
—Wall inscription

card.name: Force of Will
card.oracle_text:
You may pay 1 life and exile a blue card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
Counter target spell.
card.flavor_text: "Weren't you ever taught that it's rude to interrupt?"

card.name: Arcane Signet
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text: All Necrons bear the mark of the Triarch, a brand upon their living-metal skin that binds them to their dynasty.

card.name: Baleful Strix
card.oracle_text:
Flying, deathtouch
When this creature enters, draw a card.
card.flavor_text: Its beak rends flesh and bone, exposing the tender marrow of dream.

card.name: Birds of Paradise
card.oracle_text:
Flying
{T}: Add one mana of any color.
card.flavor_text: Its brilliant plumage painted streaks of color across a sky long darkened by war.

card.name: Flicker of Fate
card.oracle_text: Exile target creature or enchantment, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.
card.flavor_text: "Sure, I've got nine lives, but that doesn't mean I'm keen to waste one now."

card.name: Elesh Norn, Mother of Machines
card.oracle_text:
Vigilance
If a permanent entering causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.
Permanents entering don't cause abilities of permanents your opponents control to trigger.

{T}: Put a burden counter on The One Ring, then draw a card for each burden counter on The One Ring.

card.name: Wood Elves
card.oracle_text: When this creature enters, search your library for a Forest card, put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: Every branch a crossroads, every vine a swift steed.

card.name: Delighted Halfling
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a legendary spell, and that spell can't be countered.

card.name: Sword of Hearth and Home
Gemstone Caverns
card.oracle_text:
If this card is in your opening hand and you're not the starting player, you may begin the game with Gemstone Caverns on the battlefield with a luck counter on it. If you do, exile a card from your hand.
{T}: Add {C}. If Gemstone Caverns has a luck counter on it, instead add one mana of any color.
card.printed_text:
If this card is in your opening hand and you're not the starting player, you may begin the game with Glittering Caves of Aglarond on the battlefield with a luck counter on it. If you do, exile a card from your hand.
{T}: Add {C}. If Glittering Caves of Aglarond has a luck counter on it, instead add one mana of any color.

card.name: Finale of Devastation
card.oracle_text: Search your library and/or graveyard for a creature card with mana value X or less and put it onto the battlefield. If you search your library this way, shuffle. If X is 10 or more, creatures you control get +X/+X and gain haste until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: With a roar, the forest came alive.

card.name: Ghostly Flicker
card.oracle_text: Exile two target artifacts, creatures, and/or lands you control, then return those cards to the battlefield under your control.
card.flavor_text: Sometimes it's useful to take a break from existence.

card.name: Command Tower
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text:
"New Vegas is more than a city—it's the remedy to mankind's derailment."
—Mr. House

card.name: Talisman of Curiosity
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {G} or {U}. This artifact deals 1 damage to you.
card.flavor_text:
"The pain of exploring is less than the pain of not knowing."
—Tamiyo

card.name: Mulldrifter
card.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, draw two cards.
Evoke {2}{U} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Exotic Orchard
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color that a land an opponent controls could produce.
card.flavor_text: Orwell Orchards is about as peaceful and pleasant as a tomb can get.

card.name: Talisman of Hierarchy
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}. This artifact deals 1 damage to you.
card.flavor_text: The ghouls of the FMS *Northern Star* seemed interested in moving up in the world of business.

card.name: Swords to Plowshares
card.oracle_text: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.
card.flavor_text: "Tulips bring love into the world. I bring the tulips."

card.name: Yavimaya, Cradle of Growth
card.oracle_text: Each land is a Forest in addition to its other land types.
card.flavor_text:
"Multani's heart is a seed, and all of Yavimaya is its flower. There is as much life here as in the rest of Dominaria together."
—Karn

card.name: Assassin's Trophy
card.oracle_text: Destroy target permanent an opponent controls. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text:
"A merry life and a short one, as promised. How well I know myself."
—Bartholomew "Black Bart" Roberts

card.name: Beza, the Bounding Spring
card.oracle_text: When Beza enters, create a Treasure token if an opponent controls more lands than you. You gain 4 life if an opponent has more life than you. Create two 1/1 blue Fish creature tokens if an opponent controls more creatures than you. Draw a card if an opponent has more cards in hand than you.

card.name: Restoration Angel
card.oracle_text:
Flash
Flying
When this creature enters, you may exile target non-Angel creature you control, then return that card to the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Skyclave Apparition
card.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, exile up to one target nonland, nontoken permanent you don't control with mana value 4 or less.
When this creature leaves the battlefield, the exiled card's owner creates an X/X blue Illusion creature token, where X is the mana value of the exiled card.

card.name: Displacer Kitten
card.oracle_text: Avoidance — Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, exile up to one target nonland permanent you control, then return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control.
card.flavor_text:
"Isn't she the cutest thing you've almost seen?"
—Doen, purveyor of exotic pets

card.name: Deathrite Shaman
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Exile target land card from a graveyard. Add one mana of any color.
{B}, {T}: Exile target instant or sorcery card from a graveyard. Each opponent loses 2 life.
{G}, {T}: Exile target creature card from a graveyard. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Elvish Spirit Guide
card.oracle_text: Exile this creature from your hand: Add {G}.
card.flavor_text:
"We are never without guidance, if we but seek it."
—Taaveti of Kelsinko, elvish hunter

card.name: Culling Ritual
card.oracle_text: Destroy each nonland permanent with mana value 2 or less. Add {B} or {G} for each permanent destroyed this way.
card.flavor_text: "Great power requires great sacrifice. But it need not be my own."

card.name: Deadeye Navigator
card.oracle_text:
Soulbond (You may pair this creature with another unpaired creature when either enters. They remain paired for as long as you control both of them.)
As long as Deadeye Navigator is paired with another creature, each of those creatures has "{1}{U}: Exile this creature, then return it to the battlefield under your control."

card.name: Aether Channeler
card.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, choose one —
• Create a 1/1 white Bird creature token with flying.
• Return another target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.
• Draw a card.

card.name: Panharmonicon
card.oracle_text: If an artifact or creature entering causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.
card.flavor_text: All who listen hear their own song, a unique melody played just for them.

card.name: Mistrise Village
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control a Mountain or a Forest.
{T}: Add {U}.
{U}, {T}: The next spell you cast this turn can't be countered.
card.flavor_text: Built on a fumarole field, the village is a refuge of warmth amid the ice of the Qal Sisma mountains.

card.name: Y'shtola Rhul
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of your end step, exile target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. Then if it's the first end step of the turn, there is an additional end step after this step.
card.flavor_text: "As I suspected, the aetheric disturbance here is no natural occurrence."

card.name: Farseek
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a Plains, Island, Swamp, or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Lightstall Inquisitor

Vigilance
When this creature enters, each opponent exiles a card from their hand and may play that card for as long as it remains exiled. Each spell cast this way costs {1} more to cast. Each land played this way enters tapped.
card.flavor_text: Born of dead stars, the Astelli may fight for light, but they know the void as their womb.

card.name: Yarok, the Desecrated
card.oracle_text:
Deathtouch, lifelink
If a permanent entering causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.
card.flavor_text: Bala Ged scribes have stanza upon stanza of its exploits stalking jungles and the mirey quags within.

card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
